specific_question: As of January 2025, what is the percentage of the business development team at MediConn Solutions that holds a Certified Healthcare Financial Professional certificate?
answer: As of January 2025, 80% of MediConn Solutions' business development team holds a Certified Healthcare Financial Professional certificate.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions from March 2025, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending. What kind of business data can this software analyze, which would aid in the growth of Mediconn Solutions' virtual healthcare clientele going into the year 2026?
